zh.of Emral,Worthenbury,Flintshire,Wales: 英國威爾斯福林爾沃特波瑞
zh.lifeSummary: Angharad Warenne於大約1265年出生在英國史洛普爾。她於大約1297年與Richard de Puleston在威爾士丹比爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1358年享年94歲。

zh-hans.of Emral,Worthenbury,Flintshire,Wales: 英国威尔斯福林爾沃特波瑞
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Angharad Warenne于大约1265年出生在英国史洛普爾。她于大约1297年与Richard de Puleston在威尔士丹比爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1358年享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Angharad Warenne was born about 1265, in Shropshire, England. She married Richard de Puleston about 1297, in Denbighshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1358, at the age of 94.

fr.of Emral,Worthenbury,Flintshire,Wales: Worthenbury, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Angharad Warenne est née environ 1265, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Richard de Puleston environ 1297, à Denbighshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1358, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Angharad Warenne wurde um 1265 in Shropshire, England geboren. Sie hat um 1297 in Denbighshire, Wales Richard de Puleston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1358 im Alter von 94 Jahren.

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad Warenne(은)는 대략 1265년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1297년 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 Richard de Puleston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1358년 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Angharad Warenne родилась около 1265 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Puleston около 1297 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1358 г. в возрасте 94 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Angharad Warenne nació aproximadamente 1265, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Richard de Puleston aproximadamente 1297, en Denbighshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1358, a la edad de 94 años.
